LanguageData.KCSG_EnnemiesPresence.description: Enemies are present in this place.
LanguageData.KCSG_EnnemiesPresence.label: enemies present
LanguageData.CaravanRaid.label: caravan stop
LanguageData.WantedHideout.description: A safe house for a wanted criminal.
LanguageData.WantedHideout.label: safe house
LanguageData.GR_BiomechanicalLab.label: biomechanical lab complex
LanguageData.GR_AbandonedLab.label: abandoned lab
LanguageData.VPE_EltexMeteor.description: A location of an eltex meteor, highly desired by the empire. Travelling here will allow you to obtain eltex that can be used to craft psycasting gear.
LanguageData.VPE_EltexMeteor.label: eltex meteor
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneStation.label: aerodrone station
LanguageData.VFED_ControlStation.label: control station
LanguageData.VFED_DeadDrop.description: A dead drop from our deserter contact.
LanguageData.VFED_DeadDrop.label: dead drop
LanguageData.VFED_EmpireRuins.description: The former flagship of the Empire, now crashed.
LanguageData.VFED_EmpireRuins.label: crashed imperial flagship
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialConvoy.label: imperial convoy
LanguageData.VFED_PlotMission_DownedShuttle.descripti: A downed shuttle carrying a noble.
LanguageData.VFED_PlotMission_DownedShuttle.label: downed shuttle
LanguageData.VFED_PlotMission_Raid.label: noble mansion
LanguageData.VFED_ShuttleStagingPost.label: shuttle staging post
LanguageData.VFED_SupplyDepot.label: supply depot
LanguageData.VFED_TechPrinter.label: techprinter center
LanguageData.VFED_Underfarm.label: imperial underfarm
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonComplex.description: A secret imperial installation equipped with a large number of powerful zeus cannons, capable of bringing down large objects from the orbit.
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonComplex.label: zeus cannon complex
LanguageData.VFET_WildMenSite.description: A group of wild men trying to form a tribe.
LanguageData.VFET_WildMenSite.label: wild men group
LanguageData.ACM_AncientRandomComplex.description: An ancient complex containing the corpse of a mechanitor. You can try to penetrate this dangerous structure to extract the mechanitor's mechlink for your own use.
LanguageData.ACM_AncientRandomComplex.label: architectural ruins
LanguageData.AM_MALL_L_Site.label: mall
LanguageData.AM_MALL_S_Site.label: mall
LanguageData.AM_ReserveSite.label: reserve
LanguageData.AM_StreetSite.label: street
LanguageData.VQE_Quest1Site.description: A derelict site with an abandoned ARC prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_Quest1Site.label: ARC prototype
LanguageData.VQE_Quest2Site.description: An abandoned industrial complex with an ARC prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_Quest2Site.label: ARC industrial complex
LanguageData.VQE_Quest3Site.description: An even larger construction site with an ARC prototype.
LanguageData.VQE_Quest3Site.label: ancient ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Quest4Site.description: A forgotten bunker emanating a preternatural cold.
LanguageData.VQE_Quest4Site.label: buried bunker
LanguageData.VQE_Quest5Site.description: An abandoned ARC generator site where ARC components can be scavenged.
LanguageData.VQE_Quest5Site.label: ARC site
LanguageData.VQE_Quest5Site_Geothermal.description: An abandoned ARC generator site with the ruins of a geothermal ARC.
LanguageData.VQE_Quest5Site_Geothermal.label: geothermal ARC site
LanguageData.VQE_Quest5Site_Nuclear.description: An abandoned ARC generator site with the ruins of a nuclear ARC.
LanguageData.VQE_Quest5Site_Nuclear.label: nuclear ARC site
LanguageData.VFEM2_SiegeCampBase.label: siege camp
LanguageData.VFEM_SkirmishSitePart.label: skirmish location
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter1Site.description: An ancient scanning site used to locate the Cryptoforge.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter1Site.label: cryptoforge scanning site
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter2Site.description: The crash site of the Cryptoforge stern, containing the ship's black box.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter2Site.label: cryptoforge stern wreckage
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter3Site.description: The crash site of the Cryptoforge bow, containing the ship's black box.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter3Site.label: cryptoforge bow wreckage
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter4Site.description: The crash site of the legendary cryptoforge, an ancient ultratech workshop.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeChapter4Site.label: legendary cryptoforge
LanguageData.VQE_AncientICBMLaunchSite.label: ancient ICBM launch site
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSilo.label: ancient silo
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientLabComplexSite.label: abandoned supersoldier lab
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientResearchVaultSite.descriptio: A research vault containing lost ancient technologies.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientResearchVaultSite.label: ancient research vault
LanguageData.VQEA_ArchiteArraySite.description: A vast complex housing an archite pathing array.
LanguageData.VQEA_ArchiteArraySite.label: archite array site
LanguageData.VQEA_ArchiteControlVaultSite.label: dangerous supersoldier lab
LanguageData.VQEA_InhibitorResearchLabSite.descriptio: A research facility containing a mutagen inhibitor core.
LanguageData.VQEA_InhibitorResearchLabSite.label: reconnaissance request
LanguageData.VQEA_SpliceframeBlacksiteSite.descriptio: A covert underground site housing a spliceframe uplink.
LanguageData.VQEA_SpliceframeBlacksiteSite.label: infested supersoldier lab
